title: Light French Suet Pie
description: A rich and comforting French dish featuring suet, marinated with herbs and spices, perfectly adapted for a whole30-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: fresh herbs (optional)
ingredients.amount: few sprigs of thyme or rosemary, roughly chopped

instructions: Melt the unsalted butter and suet in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir in flour, cocoa powder, and ground cinnamon.
Add vanilla extract and herbs, if using. Mix until smooth.
Gradually add whole milk while stirring continuously to prevent lumps from forming. Stir until mixture is thickened (about 1 minute).
Pour the suet mixture into a greased pie dish. Allow to cool slightly before refrigerating for at least an hour to set.
Serve cold or at room temperature, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
